title: Fix config-persistence test — JSON parse error on atomic write
description: test/config-persistence.test.js 'reloadConfig reads fresh data from disk' fails with SyntaxError: Unexpected non-whitespace character after JSON at position 327. The atomic write in config.js is producing corrupt JSON (likely partial write or double-write). Error at line 79: JSON.parse(await fs.readFile(CONFIG_PATH, 'utf8')). Previous fix (task-1775852663047) resolved ENOENT but introduced JSON corruption. Investigate writeFile/rename race.
